name: Parmesan Stuffed Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve and parboil the squash.
2. Scoop out the squash halves, leaving shells about 1/4 inch thick; discard the seedy centers.
3. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon salt and the pepper.
4. Arrange in a lightly buttered 9 x 13 pan.
5. Preheat oven to 425°F.
6. Melt butter in a skillet over moderate heat, add onion, and sauté for 8 minutes until golden.
7. Remove from heat and mix in all remaining ingredients, including the remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt.
8. Stuff shells with crumb mixture.
(Note: You may prepare the recipe to this point early in the day; cool, cover, and chill. Bring to room temperature before proceeding.)
9. Bake, uncovered, for 20 - 30 minutes until crumbs are lightly browned and squash is tender.
